name: Christopher Knight Home Set of 2 26" Portman Bonded Leather Counter Height Barstool Brown: Upholstered, Wood Legs, Padded Back
description: These Christopher Knight Home Portman Counter Stools ( Set of 2) feature simple, elegant lines that complement any décor. Place them in your kitchen or anywhere you require extra seating, they are both classy and sharp, giving you the best of both worlds. Featuring an upholstered seat and seat back with sturdy rubberwood dark stained legs and a foot rail, these stools are stylish and comfortable. These Christopher Knight Home Portman Counter Stools are a great addition to any home.
